IMPORTANT CHARTS 39
house. Jupiter retrograde aspecting Capricorn shows that the native's mother
had trouble when he was young and he himself had to overcome great
difficulties, with the help of relations. The aspect on Capricorn by Mercury,
who is posited next to the Sun, indicates his father to have come into
possession of a house and to have overcome his troubles too.
As there are no planets behind Jupiter except Ketu, the native had no
elder brothers and so he was the eldest born. The father would have been
forced to marry a girl whom he did not approve.
